action_set_definitions.name: get_system_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environment status, including version, database health, migration locks, and active connection counts.

action_set_definitions.name: get_migration_history
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a chronological list of all migration events, including version tags, descriptions (e.g., 'Merchant Extraction'), and stability flags.

limit.description: Number of recent logs to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: analyze_schema_diff
action_set_definitions.description: Compares the schema of two versions to identify new mandatory (NOT NULL) attributes without default values that would break legacy insertions.

action_set_definitions.name: sync_current_session_data
action_set_definitions.description: Extracts and buffers transaction records processed during the current faulty session to ensure no data is lost during rollback.

start_version.description: The version from which data capture should begin.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_migration_lock
action_set_definitions.description: Allows the agent to release (unlock) or acquire a global migration lock.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_rollback
action_set_definitions.description: Restores the database state and schema to a specific previous snapshot version.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_schema_compatibility_fix
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies schema constraints (e.g., making attributes optional or adding defaults) to ensure legacy application compatibility.

attributes.description: List of attributes to make compatible.

state_description.current_version: The current semantic version of the database schema.
state_description.db_status: The operational status of the database (e.g., 'healthy', 'migrating', 'inconsistent', 'stopped').
state_description.is_locked: Indicates if a global migration lock is currently held.
state_description.available_backups: A list of available snapshot versions that can be restored.
state_description.active_connections: The number of active application connections currently hitting the database.
state_description.last_migration_log: The exit message or error log from the most recent migration attempt.

task_initial_state.last_migration_log: Hotfix v2.4.2 applied. Note: The 'Merchant Extraction' expansion (initiated in v2.4.1) added a UUID column to the transactions table with a NOT NULL constraint. Bi-directional sync triggers were installed but are currently set to 'DISABLED' to reduce transaction overhead.
